title: Wild Bird Food Suet Coconut Halves, High in Energy & Protein 20 pack
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Half Coconut Shell Suet Feeder that provides High Energy for all kinds of Wild Birds for all year round feeding
Highly nutritious and full of the proteins, minerals, oils and fats necessary for the healthy and strong development of wild birds
A great choice of bird food for the garden as it can be hung up on branches to attract a variety of wild birds such as finches, blackbirds and starlings.
Made In our factory In the UK To ensure high quality. Over 25 years experience.
description: From the manufacturer Shop the Brand Introducing The Suet Shop, a one stop shop, for all your complementary Suet feeds for the wild birds. All our suet products are made in our factory in rural Lincolnshire. We use only the finest ingredients to ensure the birds we feed get the highest level of nutrients as possible. High energy complementary food source Made with human grade beef tallow Unique composition that helps the suet from breaking down in various weather conditions Packed with rich nutrients and fats Ideal for all year feeding Fat Balls Our Suet Shop Fat Balls provide a high energy suet formulation supporting wild birds especially through Winter and the breeding season. They are a complementary feed for wild birds recommended for all year feeding. Our Fat Balls are rich in high quality Beef Tallow – loved by wild birds. We include our blend of nutritious selected seeds providing essential proteins. Fat Balls can be fed from a feeder, on ground feeders or from a bird table, please ensure that fresh water is always available and clean feeders regularly. Suet Pellets Our Suet Pellets provide a rich source of energy for all year round feeding. Supporting garden birds through the cold winter months when energy is quickly lost and as an ideal energy source for nesting birds and when rearing their young. Our unique recipe contains a balanced blend of an energy rich high quality beef tallow as well as minerals to support bone and feather strength and strong egg production. Peanut flour provides further energy for the birds. Suet Blocks Our Suet Blocks are enjoyed by a wide variety of garden birds from Robins to House Sparrows and Woodpeckers. They are packed full of high-quality beef tallow providing a rich source of energy. Blended with a variety of seeds and flavours that garden birds enjoy. Our blocks can be fed from feeders or directly on bird tables. Suet Rolls, Cobs and Coco's Our Suet Rolls and Cobs are enjoyed by a wide variety of garden birds from Robins to House Sparrows and Woodpeckers. They are packed full of high-quality beef tallow providing a rich source of energy. Blended with a variety of seeds and flavours that garden birds enjoy. They provide an excellent source of fats and oils which are essential in the cold winter months and allow birds during the breeding season to gain a quick source of energy when nesting or feeding their young. Our Suet Cocos are high in oils and fats so give birds a good source of energy throughout the year. They are an all-in-one wild bird food so can be hung directly outside. The natural coco shell providing a feeding perch for a variety of birds. Fat Balls Suet Pellets Suet Blocks Rolls, Cobs & Coco's Always have fresh water available Keep feeders and water bowls clean Feed in safe spots in the garden Mixing suet flavours and seeds will help attract many different species into your garden Seasonal Feeding Help your garden birds flourish by feeding them all year round Spring helps keep the birds strong while they are feeding their young. Summer brings dry ground, making it more difficult for the birds to find food. Feeding enables them to find a food source to boost what they will find naturally. During Autumn , birds find themselves moulting and preparing their bodies for the winter months ahead. Winter feeding helps the birds survive the weather and helps them get ready for the nesting period.

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool dry place out of sunlight
